title: AgentGraph — open-source trust verification for AI agents
snippet: Open-source trust infrastructure providing security scanning, trust scoring (0-100), and verified identity using W3C DIDs for cryptographically verifiable agent identities.

title: Visa Opens the Door to AI-Driven Shopping for Businesses Worldwide
snippet: Visa is working with more than 100 partners worldwide; over 30 partners actively building within the VIC sandbox, and over 20 agents and agent enablers integrating directly with Visa Intelligent Commerce.

title: Every Agent Needs an Identity: Introducing Okta for AI Agents in Early Access (EA)
snippet: Okta launched its AI Agents identity platform, treating AI agents as first-class non-human identities with lifecycle management, authentication via Identity Assertion JWTs (ID-JAGs), and centralized governance through Agent Gateway.

title: Okta for AI Agents: The Universal Agent IdP
snippet: Okta positions itself as the universal Agent Identity Provider, extending Universal Directory to autonomous entities with token exchange, service accounts, and MCP registry integration for secure agent-to-resource access.

title: Okta expands AI agent security to support new agent ecosystems and any identity provider
snippet: Okta extended its AI agent security to any identity provider and new ecosystems including Amazon Bedrock AgentCore, enabling cross-platform machine identity authentication and audit logging.

title: Okta announces new blueprint for the secure agentic enterprise
snippet: Okta unveiled its blueprint for securing the agentic enterprise at Showcase 2026, covering agent identity lifecycle, authentication, authorization, and observability for machine-to-machine interactions.

title: Okta Just Launched Agent Identity. Here's What They Got Right (and What They Missed)
snippet: Independent analysis of Okta's Agent Identity launch: praises first-class non-human identity treatment and Agent Gateway, notes gaps in zero-knowledge proof support, on-chain verification, and privacy-preserving credential delegation.

title: Copilot Cowork Goes Multi-Model: DeepSeek Signals Agentic AI Cost Control

title: What is agentic commerce? A complete guide for 2026
snippet: Infrastructure for fully agentic commerce — payments, security, identity and authorization — remains too immature for widespread autonomous checkout. 2026 is when merchant infrastructure determines who captures value.

title: World ID Launches Agent Kit to Tie Every AI Bot to a Verified Human Identity
snippet: AgentKit allows verified World ID holders to delegate their IDs to AI agents. Useful for spam prevention, anti-scalping, and preventing AI-generated content flooding. World network includes nearly 18 million verified individuals across 160+ countries.

title: Privy alternatives for Programmable Wallets

title: How Merchants Verify AI Agent Identity at Checkout 2026 | FluxA
snippet: Agent identity becomes composite: people who deployed the agent, devices it runs on, wallet addresses it controls, merchants transacted with, and accumulated reputation. KYA frameworks certify what agents are authorized to do.

title: Stripe partners with AWS to power AgentCore payments with Privy
snippet: Privy (a Stripe company) provides wallet infrastructure and payment rails powering AWS Bedrock AgentCore payments alongside Coinbase, enabling AI agents to instantly access and pay for web content, APIs, MCP servers, and other agents.

title: GitHub - LIT-Protocol/Vincent
snippet: Vincent is an agent wallet and app store framework leveraging Lit PKPs for secure agent identity management. Agents registered via Vincent hold keys and credentials managed by user-defined runtime policies, not a centralized custodian.
